checks.detail: Data Playground must restore Sandbox / Explorer / BI Workspace modes.
Data Playground must behave like an Excel pivot with row, column, value, secondary value, and BI audit controls.
Data Playground must expose original 7 dimensions.
Data Playground must expose original 6 metrics.
Data Playground chart/table interactions must open detail tables.
Analysis Tools must support multi asset/company selection and a selected contract ledger.
Analysis Tools must expose review highlights.
Data Quality must support sheet/field filtering.
Data Quality must distinguish critical source/API findings.
